    "mode": "human",
    "topic": "How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.",
    "opinion": "When I was younger, I never thought much about these kinds of topics, but now at 73 years old, especially since my parents also didn't have a lot of education, the world feels different. The main thing that concerns me is how to talk about such serious matters without getting too anxious or upset. My anxiety sometimes makes it hard for me to keep calm during discussions on social media where I spend several hours every day scrolling and commenting.",
    "reasoning_summary": "Based on my age, native Italian background, and being a cleaner who's self-employed, I have limited formal education but plenty of life experience from raising two children. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion: When I was younger, I never thought much about these kinds of topics, but now at 73 years old, especially since my parents also didn't have a lot of education, the world feels different. The main thing that concerns me is how to talk about such serious matters without getting too anxious or upset. My anxiety sometimes makes it hard for me to keep calm during discussions on social media where I spend several hours every day scrolling and commenting.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: Based on my age, native Italian background, and being a cleaner who's self-employed, I have limited formal education but plenty of life experience from raising two children. Being anxious means that when encountering complex scientific topics like COVID vaccines, which involve so many uncertainties unlike the simple tasks in daily cleaning work, it can be overwhelming for me.
